messages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Move your React context(s) to a separate file.
Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.
Unnecessary escape character: \-.

suggestions.desc: Remove the `\`. This maintains the current functionality.
Replace the `\` with `\\` to include the actual backslash character.

messages.message:
Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

/Users/dinhnguyen/Desktop/StudentProject/src/components/AdminForm.tsx:410:7
  408 |   useEffect(() => {
  409 |     if (isAuthenticated && githubToken && githubOwner && githubRepo) {
> 410 |       setLoadingCategories(true);
      |       ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ Avoid calling setState() directly within an effect
  411 |       fetchFile(getCategoriesApiUrl())
  412 |         .then(res => { setCategoriesList(res.data); setOriginalCategories(res.data); setCategoriesSha(res.sha); })
  413 |         .catch(err => { console.error(err); setFetchError('Lỗi tải danh mục. Vui lòng không lưu để tránh mất dữ liệu!'); })

React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'fetchFile', 'getArticleTypesApiUrl', 'getArticlesApiUrl', 'getCategoriesApiUrl', 'getMajorsApiUrl', and 'getProjectsApiUrl'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [isAuthenticated, githubToken, githubOwner, githubRepo, fetchFile, getCategoriesApiUrl, getProjectsApiUrl, getArticlesApiUrl, getMajorsApiUrl, getArticleTypesApiUrl]

fix.text: [isAuthenticated, githubToken, githubOwner, githubRepo, fetchFile, getCategoriesApiUrl, getProjectsApiUrl, getArticlesApiUrl, getMajorsApiUrl, getArticleTypesApiUrl]

messages.message:
Error: Cannot call impure function during render

`Date.now` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent).

/Users/dinhnguyen/Desktop/StudentProject/src/components/AdminForm.tsx:655:34
  653 |     const projectToSave = {
  654 |       ...formData,
> 655 |       id: isEdit ? formData.id : Date.now().toString(),
      |                                  ^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function
  656 |       teamMembers: formData.teamMembers.split('\n').map(m => m.trim()).filter(m => m),
  657 |       techTags: formData.techTags,
  658 |     };
